## Prerequisites

- First, check if the name for your indicator follows our [conventions](https://github.com/EVERSE-ResearchSoftware/indicators#naming-conventions)
- If the name for the indicator you chose does not fall into one of our categories, please explain why you chose it
- Also, remember to check our [contribution guidelines](https://github.com/EVERSE-ResearchSoftware/indicators/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Description

- Explain the indicator proposed on this Pull Request (source, how to measure it, core idea, expected outputs)
- Indicate if there is an issue associated to this PR (fixes #XXX)

## Considerations

- Indicate if this is a draft
- Tag responsible maintainers, if any
